name: Widescreen Tools
author: nabagaca
description: Experimental widescreen support that relaxes Terraria's forced minimum zoom for ultrawide displays.

overrideForcedMinimumZoom.label: Override Forced Zoom
overrideForcedMinimumZoom.description: Replace Terraria's vanilla world-view limit used to force zoom on large resolutions

enableCustomZoomRange.label: Enable Custom Zoom Range
enableCustomZoomRange.description: Allow zooming beyond Terraria's default 100%-200% target range

zoomRangeMultiplier.label: Zoom Range Multiplier
zoomRangeMultiplier.description: Range size multiplier around vanilla zoom range; 2.0 gives roughly 50%-250%

unlockHighResModes.label: Unlock High Res Modes
unlockHighResModes.description: Raise Terraria's internal resolution caps and register native monitor resolutions

persistResolution.label: Persist Resolution
persistResolution.description: Save the active resolution in Widescreen Tools config and restore it on startup

desiredResolutionWidth.label: Resolution Width
desiredResolutionWidth.description: Target display resolution width; also used as the world-view zoom reference. 0 = use native display resolution. Saved automatically when you change resolution in-game.

desiredResolutionHeight.label: Resolution Height
desiredResolutionHeight.description: Target display resolution height; also used as the world-view zoom reference. 0 = use native display resolution. Saved automatically when you change resolution in-game.
